name: URZ3 Energy Corp.
description: URZ3 Energy Corp. is a resource exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of strategic uranium assets in North America. Led by an experienced management team with a proven track record of successful project exits, the company is advancing high-potential properties, including the Dry Fork Uranium Project in Wyoming and a significant land package in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan. By leveraging advanced exploration techniques and targeting regions with established infrastructure, URZ3 Energy aims to address the rising global demand for nuclear energy and contribute to North American energy security.
